manpage.c(3) Library Functions Manual manpage.c(3)

NAME

manpage.c - Man page generation using modular architecture.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


const char * escape_groff_special (const char *str)
const char * format_mode_names (option_mode_bitmask_t mode_bitmask)
asciichat_error_t options_config_generate_manpage_template (const options_config_t *config, const char *program_name, const char *mode_name, const char *output_path, const char *brief_description)
asciichat_error_t options_builder_generate_manpage_template (options_builder_t *builder, const char *program_name, const char *mode_name, const char *output_path, const char *brief_description)
asciichat_error_t options_config_generate_manpage_merged (const options_config_t *config, const char *program_name, const char *mode_name, const char *output_path, const char *brief_description)
parsed_section_t * parse_manpage_sections (const char *filepath, size_t *num_sections)
void free_parsed_sections (parsed_section_t *sections, size_t num_sections)
const parsed_section_t * find_section (const parsed_section_t *sections, size_t num_sections, const char *section_name)
asciichat_error_t options_config_generate_final_manpage (const char *template_path, const char *output_path, const char *version_string, const char *content_file_path)

Detailed Description

Man page generation using modular architecture.

Refactored to use modular layers:

  • Resources: Loading embedded/filesystem templates
  • Parser: Parsing existing man page sections
  • Formatter: Groff/troff formatting utilities
  • Content Generators: OPTIONS, ENVIRONMENT, USAGE, EXAMPLES, POSITIONAL
  • Merger: Intelligently merging auto-generated with manual content

Definition in file options/manpage.c.

Function Documentation

39   return str ? str : "";
40 }

    manpage_content_generate_options(),
    manpage_content_generate_positional(), and
    manpage_content_generate_usage().

  parsed_section_t * find_section (const parsed_section_t * sections, size_t
  num_sections, const char * section_name)

703   return manpage_parser_find_section(sections, num_sections, section_name);

References manpage_parser_find_section().






const
  char * format_mode_names (option_mode_bitmask_t mode_bitmask)


Definition at line 42 of file options/manpage.c.


42                                                                   {
43   if (mode_bitmask == 0) {
44     return NULL;
45   }
46 
47   if ((mode_bitmask & OPTION_MODE_BINARY) && !(mode_bitmask & 0x1F)) {
48     return "global";
49   }
50 
51   option_mode_bitmask_t user_modes_mask = (1 << MODE_SERVER) | (1 << MODE_CLIENT) | (1 << MODE_MIRROR) |
52                                           (1 << MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE) | (1 << MODE_DISCOVERY);
53   if ((mode_bitmask & user_modes_mask) == user_modes_mask) {
54     // If all user modes are set, check if binary-level is also set
55     if (mode_bitmask & OPTION_MODE_BINARY) {
56       return "global, client, server, mirror, discovery-service";
57     }
58     return "all modes";
59   }
60 
61   static char mode_str[256];
62   mode_str[0] = '\0';
63   int pos = 0;
64 
65   // Add global if binary-level is set
66   if (mode_bitmask & OPTION_MODE_BINARY) {
67     pos += safe_snprintf(mode_str + pos, sizeof(mode_str) - pos, "global");
68   }
69 
70   // List modes in order: default, client, server, mirror, discovery-service
71   if (mode_bitmask & (1 << MODE_DISCOVERY)) {
72     pos += safe_snprintf(mode_str + pos, sizeof(mode_str) - pos, "%sdefault", pos > 0 ? ", " : "");
73   }
74   if (mode_bitmask & (1 << MODE_CLIENT)) {
75     pos += safe_snprintf(mode_str + pos, sizeof(mode_str) - pos, "%sclient", pos > 0 ? ", " : "");
76   }
77   if (mode_bitmask & (1 << MODE_SERVER)) {
78     pos += safe_snprintf(mode_str + pos, sizeof(mode_str) - pos, "%sserver", pos > 0 ? ", " : "");
79   }
80   if (mode_bitmask & (1 << MODE_MIRROR)) {
81     pos += safe_snprintf(mode_str + pos, sizeof(mode_str) - pos, "%smirror", pos > 0 ? ", " : "");
82   }
83   if (mode_bitmask & (1 << MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE)) {
84     pos += safe_snprintf(mode_str + pos, sizeof(mode_str) - pos, "%sdiscovery-service", pos > 0 ? ", " : "");
85   }
86 
87   return pos > 0 ? mode_str : NULL;
88 }






References safe_snprintf().


Referenced by manpage_content_generate_options().

  free_parsed_sections (parsed_section_t * sections, size_t

asciichat_error_t
  options_builder_generate_manpage_template (options_builder_t * builder, const
  char * program_name, const char * mode_name, const char * output_path, const
  char * brief_description)


Definition at line 217 of file
  options/manpage.c.


219                                                                                            {
220   if (!builder || !program_name || !brief_description) {
221     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Missing required parameters");
222   }
223 
224   const options_config_t *config = options_builder_build(builder);
225   if (!config) {
226     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to build options configuration");
227   }
228 
229   return options_config_generate_manpage_template(config, program_name, mode_name, output_path, brief_description);
230 }






References options_builder_build(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().






asciichat_error_t
  options_config_generate_final_manpage (const char * template_path, const char
  * output_path, const char * version_string, const char *
  content_file_path)


Definition at line 707 of file
  options/manpage.c.


708                                                                                                                    {
709   (void)template_path;
710   (void)output_path;
711   (void)version_string;
712   (void)content_file_path;
713   return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Not implemented in refactored version");

asciichat_error_t
  options_config_generate_manpage_merged (const options_config_t * config, const
  char * program_name, const char * mode_name, const char * output_path, const
  char * brief_description)


Definition at line 232 of file
  options/manpage.c.


234                                                                                         {
235   (void)mode_name;         // Not used
236   (void)program_name;      // Not used
237   (void)brief_description; // Not used
238 
239   if (!config) {
240     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "config is required for man page generation");
241   }
242 
243   FILE *f = NULL;
244   bool should_close = false;
245 
246   if (output_path && strlen(output_path) > 0 && strcmp(output_path, "-") != 0) {
247     // Check if file already exists and prompt for confirmation
248     struct stat st;
249     if (stat(output_path, &st) == 0) {
250       // File exists - ask user if they want to overwrite
251       log_plain("Man page file already exists: %s", output_path);
252 
253       bool overwrite = platform_prompt_yes_no("Overwrite", false); // Default to No
254       if (!overwrite) {
255         log_plain("Man page generation cancelled.");
256         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "User cancelled overwrite");
257       }
258 
259       log_plain("Overwriting existing man page file...");
260     }
261 
262     f = platform_fopen("file_stream", output_path, "w");
263     if (!f) {
264       return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to open output file: %s", output_path);
265     }
266     should_close = true;
267   } else {
268     f = stdout;
269   }
270 
271   // Load template resources
272   manpage_resources_t resources;
273   memset(&resources, 0, sizeof(resources));
274   asciichat_error_t err = manpage_resources_load(&resources);
275   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
276     if (should_close)
277       fclose(f);
278     return err;
279   }
280 
281   if (!manpage_resources_is_valid(&resources)) {
282     if (should_close)
283       fclose(f);
284     manpage_resources_destroy(&resources);
285     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Man page resources are not valid");
286   }
287 
288   // Process template and merge AUTO sections with generated content
289   const char *template_content = resources.template_content;
290   const char *p = template_content;
291 
292   bool in_auto_section = false;
293   char current_auto_section[128] = "";
294   bool found_section_header = false;
295 
296   // Track MERGE sections
297   bool in_merge_section = false;
298   bool merge_content_generated = false;
299   char current_merge_section[64] = {0};
300 
301   // For ENVIRONMENT MERGE section: collect manual variables
302   const char **manual_env_vars = NULL;
303   const char **manual_env_descs = NULL;
304   size_t manual_env_count = 0;
305   size_t manual_env_capacity = 0;
306 
307   while (*p) {
308     // Find next line
309     const char *line_end = strchr(p, '\n');
310     if (!line_end) {
311       // Last line without newline
312       if (!in_auto_section && !in_merge_section) {
313         fputs(p, f);
314       }
315       break;
316     }
317 
318     size_t line_len = (size_t)(line_end - p);
319 
320     // Check for MERGE-START marker (only in current line)
321     bool has_merge_start = false;
322     if (strstr(p, "MERGE-START:") != NULL && strstr(p, "MERGE-START:") < line_end) {
323       has_merge_start = true;
324     }
325 
326     if (has_merge_start) {
327       in_merge_section = true;
328       merge_content_generated = false;
329       manual_env_count = 0; // Reset manual variable collection
330       manual_env_capacity = 0;
331 
332       // Extract section name (e.g., "ENVIRONMENT" from "MERGE-START: ENVIRONMENT")
333       const char *section_start = strstr(p, "MERGE-START:");
334       if (section_start && section_start < line_end) {
335         section_start += strlen("MERGE-START:");
336         while (*section_start && section_start < line_end && isspace(*section_start))
337           section_start++;
338 
339         const char *section_name_end = section_start;
340         while (section_name_end < line_end && *section_name_end && *section_name_end != '\n') {
341           section_name_end++;
342         }
343 
344         while (section_name_end > section_start && isspace(*(section_name_end - 1))) {
345           section_name_end--;
346         }
347 
348         size_t section_name_len = (size_t)(section_name_end - section_start);
349         if (section_name_len > 0 && section_name_len < sizeof(current_merge_section)) {
350           SAFE_STRNCPY(current_merge_section, section_start, section_name_len);
351           current_merge_section[section_name_len] = '\0';
352         }
353       }
354 
355       // Do NOT write the MERGE-START marker line - it's an internal control marker
356       // The content will be generated when MERGE-END is encountered
357 
358       // For ENVIRONMENT MERGE sections, find and preserve the .SH header
359       // (skipping over any marker comment lines that might be in between)
360       if (strcmp(current_merge_section, "ENVIRONMENT") == 0) {
361         const char *search_line = line_end + 1;
362         bool found_header = false;
363         while (*search_line && !found_header) {
364           const char *search_line_end = strchr(search_line, '\n');
365           if (!search_line_end)
366             break;
367 
368           // Check if this is the .SH header
369           if (strncmp(search_line, ".SH ", 4) == 0) {
370             // Write the .SH header line
371             size_t header_len = (size_t)(search_line_end - search_line);
372             fwrite(search_line, 1, header_len + 1, f);
373             p = search_line_end + 1;
374             found_header = true;
375             break;
376           }
377 
378           // Skip marker comment lines (.\" MANUAL-*, .\" MERGE-*, etc)
379           if (strncmp(search_line, ".\\\" ", 4) == 0) {
380             search_line = search_line_end + 1;
381             continue; // Keep searching
382           }
383 
384           // If we hit a non-marker, non-.SH line, stop searching
385           break;
386         }
387         if (found_header) {
388           continue; // Skip the "Skip to next line" at line 359
389         }
390       }
391 
392       // Skip to next line
393       p = line_end + 1;
394       continue;
395 
396     } else if (in_merge_section && strstr(p, "MERGE-END:") != NULL && strstr(p, "MERGE-END:") < line_end) {
397       // Before writing MERGE-END, generate content if not already done
398       if (!merge_content_generated) {
399         if (strcmp(current_merge_section, "ENVIRONMENT") == 0) {
400           log_debug("[MANPAGE] Generating ENVIRONMENT with %zu manual + %zu auto variables", manual_env_count,
401                     config->num_descriptors);
402           char *env_content = manpage_content_generate_environment_with_manual(config, manual_env_vars,
403                                                                                manual_env_count, manual_env_descs);
404           if (env_content && *env_content != '\0') {
405             log_debug("[MANPAGE] Writing ENVIRONMENT content: %zu bytes", strlen(env_content));
406             fprintf(f, "%s", env_content);
407           } else {
408             log_warn("[MANPAGE] ENVIRONMENT content is empty!");
409           }
410           manpage_content_free_environment(env_content);
411         }
412         merge_content_generated = true;
413       }
414 
415       in_merge_section = false;
416       // Do NOT write the MERGE-END marker line - it's an internal control marker
417       memset(current_merge_section, 0, sizeof(current_merge_section));
418 
419       // Free collected manual variables (strings first, then arrays)
420       for (size_t i = 0; i < manual_env_count; i++) {
421         if (manual_env_vars && manual_env_vars[i]) {
422           char *var_name = (char *)manual_env_vars[i];
423           SAFE_FREE(var_name);
424         }
425         if (manual_env_descs && manual_env_descs[i]) {
426           char *var_desc = (char *)manual_env_descs[i];
427           SAFE_FREE(var_desc);
428         }
429       }
430       if (manual_env_vars) {
431         SAFE_FREE(manual_env_vars);
432         manual_env_vars = NULL;
433       }
434       if (manual_env_descs) {
435         SAFE_FREE(manual_env_descs);
436         manual_env_descs = NULL;
437       }
438       manual_env_count = 0;
439       manual_env_capacity = 0;
440 
441       p = line_end + 1;
442       continue;
443 
444     } else if (in_merge_section) {
445       // Within MERGE section: collect manual environment variables for ENVIRONMENT section
446       if (strcmp(current_merge_section, "ENVIRONMENT") == 0) {
447         // Check if line starts with ".TP" or ".B " (groff markers)
448         bool is_tp_marker = (line_len >= 3 && strncmp(p, ".TP", 3) == 0 && (line_len == 3 || isspace(p[3])));
449         bool is_b_marker = (line_len >= 3 && strncmp(p, ".B ", 3) == 0);
450 
451         if (is_b_marker) {
452           // Extract variable name after ".B "
453           const char *var_start = p + 3;
454           while (*var_start && var_start < line_end && isspace(*var_start))
455             var_start++;
456 
457           const char *var_end = var_start;
458           while (var_end < line_end && *var_end && *var_end != '\n') {
459             var_end++;
460           }
461 
462           size_t var_len = (size_t)(var_end - var_start);
463           if (var_len > 0) {
464             char *var_name = SAFE_MALLOC(var_len + 1, char *);
465             SAFE_STRNCPY(var_name, var_start, var_len);
466             var_name[var_len] = '\0';
467 
468             // Trim trailing whitespace
469             while (var_len > 0 && isspace(var_name[var_len - 1])) {
470               var_name[--var_len] = '\0';
471             }
472 
473             // Store the variable name
474             if (manual_env_count >= manual_env_capacity) {
475               manual_env_capacity = manual_env_capacity == 0 ? 16 : manual_env_capacity * 2;
476               manual_env_vars =
477                   SAFE_REALLOC(manual_env_vars, manual_env_capacity * sizeof(const char *), const char **);
478               manual_env_descs =
479                   SAFE_REALLOC(manual_env_descs, manual_env_capacity * sizeof(const char *), const char **);
480             }
481 
482             manual_env_vars[manual_env_count] = var_name;
483             manual_env_descs[manual_env_count] = NULL; // Will be set from next line(s)
484             manual_env_count++;
485           }
486         } else if (manual_env_count > 0 && !is_tp_marker && !is_b_marker) {
487           // This is likely a description line following a ".B var_name" line
488           // Set description for the last collected variable
489           const char *desc_start = p;
490           while (*desc_start && desc_start < line_end && isspace(*desc_start))
491             desc_start++;
492 
493           size_t desc_len = (size_t)(line_end - desc_start);
494           if (desc_len > 0 && manual_env_descs[manual_env_count - 1] == NULL) {
495             char *desc = SAFE_MALLOC(desc_len + 1, char *);
496             SAFE_STRNCPY(desc, desc_start, desc_len);
497             desc[desc_len] = '\0';
498 
499             // Trim trailing whitespace
500             while (desc_len > 0 && isspace(desc[desc_len - 1])) {
501               desc[--desc_len] = '\0';
502             }
503 
504             if (desc_len > 0) {
505               manual_env_descs[manual_env_count - 1] = desc;
506             } else {
507               SAFE_FREE(desc);
508             }
509           }
510         }
511         // For ENVIRONMENT MERGE sections, do NOT write template content
512         // All content will be generated at MERGE-END
513         p = line_end + 1;
514         continue;
515       } else {
516         // For other MERGE sections (if any), write template content as-is
517         fwrite(p, 1, line_len + 1, f);
518         p = line_end + 1;
519         continue;
520       }
521     }
522 
523     // Check for AUTO-START marker (only in current line)
524     bool has_auto_start = false;
525     const char *temp = p;
526     while (temp < line_end) {
527       if (strstr(temp, "AUTO-START:") != NULL) {
528         const char *found = strstr(temp, "AUTO-START:");
529         if (found < line_end) {
530           has_auto_start = true;
531           break;
532         }
533         // strstr() found it but it's beyond this line, so keep looking
534         temp = found + 1;
535       } else {
536         break;
537       }
538     }
539 
540     if (has_auto_start) {
541       in_auto_section = true;
542       found_section_header = false;
543 
544       // Extract section name (e.g., "SYNOPSIS" from "AUTO-START: SYNOPSIS")
545       const char *section_start = strstr(p, "AUTO-START:");
546       if (section_start && section_start < line_end) {
547         section_start += strlen("AUTO-START:");
548         while (*section_start && section_start < line_end && isspace(*section_start))
549           section_start++;
550 
551         const char *section_name_end = section_start;
552         // Extract section name: everything until end of line, then trim trailing whitespace
553         while (section_name_end < line_end && *section_name_end && *section_name_end != '\n') {
554           section_name_end++;
555         }
556 
557         // Now trim trailing whitespace from the section name
558         while (section_name_end > section_start && isspace(*(section_name_end - 1))) {
559           section_name_end--;
560         }
561 
562         size_t section_name_len = (size_t)(section_name_end - section_start);
563         if (section_name_len > 0 && section_name_len < sizeof(current_auto_section)) {
564           SAFE_STRNCPY(current_auto_section, section_start, section_name_len);
565           current_auto_section[section_name_len] = '\0';
566         }
567       }
568 
569       // Don't write the AUTO-START marker line - it's an internal control comment
570 
571     } else if (strstr(p, "AUTO-END:") != NULL && strstr(p, "AUTO-END:") < line_end) {
572       in_auto_section = false;
573       // Don't write the AUTO-END marker line - it's an internal control comment
574       memset(current_auto_section, 0, sizeof(current_auto_section));
575       found_section_header = false;
576 
577     } else if (in_auto_section) {
578       // Preserve comment lines that come before the section header
579       if (!found_section_header && strstr(p, ".\\\"") != NULL && strstr(p, ".\\\"") < line_end) {
580         // Skip comment lines in AUTO sections that contain "auto-generated" text
581         if (strstr(p, "auto-generated") == NULL) {
582           // Non-marker comment lines can be preserved
583           fwrite(p, 1, line_len + 1, f);
584         }
585         // Skip comment lines with "auto-generated" marker text
586       } else if (!found_section_header && strstr(p, ".SH ") != NULL && strstr(p, ".SH ") < line_end) {
587         // If this is the section header line (.SH ...), write it and generate content
588         fwrite(p, 1, line_len + 1, f);
589         found_section_header = true;
590 
591         // Generate content for this AUTO section
592         if (strcmp(current_auto_section, "SYNOPSIS") == 0) {
593           log_debug("[MANPAGE] Generating SYNOPSIS section");
594           char *synopsis_content = NULL;
595           size_t synopsis_len = 0;
596           asciichat_error_t gen_err = manpage_merger_generate_synopsis(NULL, &synopsis_content, &synopsis_len);
597           log_debug("[MANPAGE] SYNOPSIS: err=%d, len=%zu", gen_err, synopsis_len);
598           if (gen_err == ASCIICHAT_OK && synopsis_content && synopsis_len > 0) {
599             fprintf(f, "%s", synopsis_content);
600             manpage_merger_free_content(synopsis_content);
601           }
602         } else if (strcmp(current_auto_section, "POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS") == 0) {
603           log_debug("[MANPAGE] Generating POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS (config has %zu args)", config->num_positional_args);
604           char *pos_content = manpage_content_generate_positional(config);
605           if (pos_content) {
606             size_t pos_len = strlen(pos_content);
607             log_debug("[MANPAGE] POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS: %zu bytes", pos_len);
608             if (*pos_content != '\0') {
609               fprintf(f, "%s", pos_content);
610             }
611           }
612           manpage_content_free_positional(pos_content);
613         } else if (strcmp(current_auto_section, "USAGE") == 0) {
614           log_debug("[MANPAGE] Generating USAGE (config has %zu usage lines)", config->num_usage_lines);
615           char *usage_content = NULL;
616           size_t usage_len = 0;
617           asciichat_error_t usage_err = manpage_merger_generate_usage(config, &usage_content, &usage_len);
618           log_debug("[MANPAGE] USAGE: err=%d, len=%zu", usage_err, usage_len);
619           if (usage_err == ASCIICHAT_OK && usage_content && usage_len > 0) {
620             fprintf(f, "%s", usage_content);
621             manpage_merger_free_content(usage_content);
622           }
623         } else if (strcmp(current_auto_section, "EXAMPLES") == 0) {
624           log_debug("[MANPAGE] Generating EXAMPLES (config has %zu examples)", config->num_examples);
625           char *examples_content = manpage_content_generate_examples(config);
626           if (examples_content) {
627             size_t ex_len = strlen(examples_content);
628             log_debug("[MANPAGE] EXAMPLES: %zu bytes", ex_len);
629             if (*examples_content != '\0') {
630               fprintf(f, "%s", examples_content);
631             }
632           }
633           manpage_content_free_examples(examples_content);
634         } else if (strcmp(current_auto_section, "OPTIONS") == 0) {
635           log_debug("[MANPAGE] Generating OPTIONS (config has %zu descriptors)", config->num_descriptors);
636           char *options_content = manpage_content_generate_options(config);
637           if (options_content) {
638             size_t opt_len = strlen(options_content);
639             log_debug("[MANPAGE] OPTIONS: %zu bytes", opt_len);
640             if (*options_content != '\0') {
641               fprintf(f, "%s", options_content);
642             }
643           }
644           manpage_content_free_options(options_content);
645         }
646       }
647       // Otherwise skip old content between section header and AUTO-END
648     } else {
649       // Write all manual content (not in AUTO section)
650       // Skip marker comment lines: .\" AUTO-*, .\" MANUAL-*, .\" MERGE-*
651       // These are internal build-time control comments
652       bool is_marker_comment = (strstr(p, ".\\\" AUTO-") != NULL && strstr(p, ".\\\" AUTO-") < line_end) ||
653                                (strstr(p, ".\\\" MANUAL-") != NULL && strstr(p, ".\\\" MANUAL-") < line_end) ||
654                                (strstr(p, ".\\\" MERGE-") != NULL && strstr(p, ".\\\" MERGE-") < line_end);
655       if (!is_marker_comment) {
656         fwrite(p, 1, line_len + 1, f);
657       }
658     }
659 
660     // Move to next line
661     p = line_end + 1;
662   }
663 
664   manpage_resources_destroy(&resources);
665 
666   fflush(f);
667   if (should_close) {
668     fclose(f);
669   }
670 
671   log_debug("Generated merged man page to %s", output_path ? output_path : "stdout");
672   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
673 }






References manpage_content_free_environment(),
    manpage_content_free_examples(),
    manpage_content_free_options(),
    manpage_content_free_positional(),
    manpage_content_generate_environment_with_manual(),
    manpage_content_generate_examples(),
    manpage_content_generate_options(),
    manpage_content_generate_positional(),
    manpage_merger_free_content(),
    manpage_merger_generate_synopsis(),
    manpage_merger_generate_usage(), manpage_resources_destroy(),
    manpage_resources_is_valid(), manpage_resources_load(),
    platform_fopen(), and platform_prompt_yes_no().


Referenced by action_create_manpage(), and
    options_init().






asciichat_error_t
  options_config_generate_manpage_template (const options_config_t * config,
  const char * program_name, const char * mode_name, const char * output_path,
  const char * brief_description)


Definition at line 94 of file options/manpage.c.


96                                                                                           {
97   if (!config || !program_name || !brief_description) {
98     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Missing required parameters for man page generation");
99   }
100 
101   FILE *f = NULL;
102   bool should_close = false;
103 
104   if (output_path) {
105     f = platform_fopen("file_stream", output_path, "w");
106     if (!f) {
107       return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to open output file: %s", output_path);
108     }
109     should_close = true;
110   } else {
111     f = stdout;
112   }
113 
114   // Write title/header
115   manpage_fmt_write_title(f, program_name, mode_name, brief_description);
116 
117   // Write SYNOPSIS
118   char *synopsis_content = NULL;
119   size_t synopsis_len = 0;
120   asciichat_error_t err = manpage_merger_generate_synopsis(mode_name, &synopsis_content, &synopsis_len);
121   if (err == ASCIICHAT_OK && synopsis_content && synopsis_len > 0) {
122     fprintf(f, "%s", synopsis_content);
123     manpage_merger_free_content(synopsis_content);
124   }
125 
126   // Write POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS if present
127   if (config->num_positional_args > 0) {
128     char *pos_content = manpage_content_generate_positional(config);
129     if (pos_content && *pos_content != '\0') {
130       fprintf(f, "%s", pos_content);
131     }
132     manpage_content_free_positional(pos_content);
133   }
134 
135   // Write DESCRIPTION
136   manpage_fmt_write_section(f, "DESCRIPTION");
137   fprintf(f, ".B ascii-chat\nis a terminal-based video chat application that converts webcam video to ASCII\n");
138   fprintf(f, "art in real-time. It enables video chat directly in your terminal, whether you're\n");
139   fprintf(f, "using a local console, a remote SSH session, or any terminal emulator.\n");
140   manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(f);
141 
142   // Write USAGE
143   char *usage_content = NULL;
144   size_t usage_len = 0;
145   err = manpage_merger_generate_usage(config, &usage_content, &usage_len);
146   if (err == ASCIICHAT_OK && usage_content && usage_len > 0) {
147     fprintf(f, ".SH USAGE\n%s", usage_content);
148     manpage_merger_free_content(usage_content);
149   }
150 
151   // Write OPTIONS
152   if (config->num_descriptors > 0) {
153     char *options_content = manpage_content_generate_options(config);
154     if (options_content && *options_content != '\0') {
155       fprintf(f, "%s", options_content);
156     }
157     manpage_content_free_options(options_content);
158   }
159 
160   // Write EXAMPLES if present
161   if (config->num_examples > 0) {
162     char *examples_content = manpage_content_generate_examples(config);
163     if (examples_content && *examples_content != '\0') {
164       fprintf(f, "%s", examples_content);
165     }
166     manpage_content_free_examples(examples_content);
167   }
168 
169   // Write ENVIRONMENT if present
170   bool has_env_vars = false;
171   for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_descriptors; i++) {
172     if (config->descriptors[i].env_var_name) {
173       has_env_vars = true;
174       break;
175     }
176   }
177 
178   if (has_env_vars) {
179     char *env_content = manpage_content_generate_environment(config);
180     if (env_content && *env_content != '\0') {
181       fprintf(f, "%s", env_content);
182     }
183     manpage_content_free_environment(env_content);
184   }
185 
186   // Write placeholder manual sections
187   manpage_fmt_write_section(f, "FILES");
188   fprintf(f, ".I ~/.ascii-chat/config.toml\n");
189   fprintf(f, "User configuration file\n");
190   manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(f);
191 
192   manpage_fmt_write_section(f, "NOTES");
193   fprintf(f, "For more information and examples, visit the project repository.\n");
194   manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(f);
195 
196   manpage_fmt_write_section(f, "BUGS");
197   fprintf(f, "Report bugs at the project issue tracker.\n");
198   manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(f);
199 
200   manpage_fmt_write_section(f, "AUTHOR");
201   fprintf(f, "Contributed by the ascii-chat community.\n");
202   manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(f);
203 
204   manpage_fmt_write_section(f, "SEE ALSO");
205   fprintf(f, ".B man(1),\n");
206   fprintf(f, ".B groff_man(7)\n");
207   manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(f);
208 
209   if (should_close) {
210     fclose(f);
211   }
212 
213   log_debug("Generated man page template to %s", output_path ? output_path : "stdout");
214   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
215 }






References manpage_content_free_environment(),
    manpage_content_free_examples(),
    manpage_content_free_options(),
    manpage_content_free_positional(),
    manpage_content_generate_environment(),
    manpage_content_generate_examples(),
    manpage_content_generate_options(),
    manpage_content_generate_positional(),
    manpage_fmt_write_blank_line(), manpage_fmt_write_section(),
    manpage_fmt_write_title(), manpage_merger_free_content(),
    manpage_merger_generate_synopsis(),
    manpage_merger_generate_usage(), and platform_fopen().


Referenced by
  options_builder_generate_manpage_template().






parsed_section_t
  * parse_manpage_sections (const char * filepath, size_t *
  num_sections)


Definition at line 675 of file
  options/manpage.c.


675                                                                                      {
676   if (!filepath || !num_sections) {
677     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
678     return NULL;
679   }
680 
681   FILE *f = platform_fopen("file_stream", filepath, "r");
682   if (!f) {
683     SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to open file: %s", filepath);
684     return NULL;
685   }
686 
687   parsed_section_t *sections = NULL;
688   asciichat_error_t err = manpage_parser_parse_file(f, &sections, num_sections);
689   fclose(f);
690 
691   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
692     return NULL;
693   }
694 
695   return sections;
696 }






References manpage_parser_parse_file(), and
    platform_fopen().
